title: Pistony Edition
description: Necessary mods for improved graphics and more
body:
## About

👋 Hello! 😄

📦 I am pleased to announce that I have developed a modpack that is designed to optimize the game at the highest level.

🕵️‍♂️ If you like to play games, you probably know that mods can significantly improve the gameplay. However, choosing the right mods can be quite difficult, because there are a huge number of them on the Internet. I decided to simplify this process for you and created a modpack that contains only the most necessary mods for a comfortable game.

🎨 In addition, I have not forgotten about the design, and the main menu has been changed in a more futuristic style to make the gameplay even more enjoyable.

🚀 In the future, I plan to add some QOL modifications to make the gameplay even more comfortable. I kindly ask you to follow the updates to be aware of all new features and changes.

👉 However, I want to remind you that this modpack is under development, so it may be changed in the future. If you have any suggestions or comments, please feel free to contact me. 📩

🙏 Thank you for choosing my modpack to optimize your game. I hope it will make your gaming life better and more comfortable! 👍

## Comparision Vanilla and modpack

This is the first modpack fully tested on Apple devices.

110~128fps (max: 133fps, min: 70fps) - Vanilla

190 ~ 220 fps (max: 240fps, min: 170fps) - Modpack

-> Increased by ~80.45 % 



Tested on MacBook Air M1
